view.name: Views
view.remoteness: The Remoteness View tracks the change in the remoteness value after every turn. Remoteness is the distance from a position to a forced primitive position (to the end of the game).
view.winby: The Win By View tracks the change in the win by value after every turn. Win By is the net amount of points a player will achieve at the end of the game assuming both players follow perfect play.
view.draws: The Draw Level View tracks whether a position is a pure draw, non-draw, or a non-pure draw. If the position is a pure draw, the view displays its draw-level remoteness, and draw fringe. Draw-level remoteness is the distance from a position to the next draw fringe.
view.column: The Colum View lists the available moves at the current position along with their position value (win, lose, tie, draw), draw level, remoteness value, and their win by value.
view.mex: The Mex View tracks the change in the mex (minimum excluded value) value after every turn.
view.tree: The Tree View shows the game tree as the positions are being explored.
